original_image_tags: Scan of a document's back page, likely a carbon copy or routing slip. The page is mostly blank, aged paper with some fading text impressions from the reverse side showing through. A single hole punch is visible at the top center. A horizontal staple mark or tear is present near the bottom edge. A small, tan-colored label with illegible text is affixed in the upper right corner.

elements.description: A faint blue ink stamp containing the text 'REC'D DOM INTELL DIV.', a date 'JUL 26', and handwritten time notation 'JUL 29 PM 4:25 PM 71'. Below it is a faint, partially legible stamp or text. A small, rectangular, brownish sticker or label is attached to the top right corner. The page also contains faint, illegible typewritten or printed text bleed-through from the reverse side.

judge.reason: Description B claims to quote specific verbatim text from a stamp ('REC'D DOM INTELL DIV.', 'JUL 26', 'JUL 29 PM 4:25 PM 71') that Description A does not mention at all, indicating a major discrepancy in the perceived visual content.
